name: opentagcloud-monorepo
description: openTagCloud monorepo — framework-agnostic core plus Svelte, React, Vue, Angular, SolidJS, and Next.js adapters.
author: Henry Koren

scripts.build: npm run build -w @opentagcloud/core && npm run build -w opentagcloud -w @opentagcloud/react -w @opentagcloud/vue -w @opentagcloud/solid -w @opentagcloud/next && npm run build -w @opentagcloud/angular
